execution_run.what happened: Finished the test-suite migration lane by converting additional standalone regression clusters into loop-based behavior-class matrices, recording historical migration evidence, adding advisory suite budgets, and dogfooding Verification inventory review.
execution_run.scope touched: Generated command proof-runner tests, model harness tests, planning archive tests, maintainer testing strategy docs, test knowledge inventory, contract replacement inventory, maintainer surface drift guard.

finished_run_review.scope respected: Each removed standalone test is represented by a named scenario row in a retained matrix or by durable historical migration records. Verification remained diagnostic: it surfaced inventory context and review facts without assigning owners or dispositions.

delegation_outcome_feedback.route skipped reason: No delegation route was recorded; prepare-closeout normalized archive-only residue.
delegation_outcome_feedback.proof result: yes; planning closeout recorded explicit proof input.

proof_report.validation proof: make test-workspace passed (124.02s); make lint-workspace passed; make test-planning passed (8.97s); make lint-planning passed; make maintainer-surfaces passed; uv run pytest tests/test_model_cli_harness.py -q passed (112 tests); focused pytest for generated proof runner, model harness, planning archive, and maintainer surfaces passed (248 tests); collection tests packages = 1698; Verification dogfood surfaced docs/maintainer/test-knowledge-inventory.md and 232 needs-human-strategy-choice candidates across 3 touched hotspot files
proof_report.proof achieved now: yes; planning closeout recorded explicit proof input.
